creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks, I'm aware of the new version and working on the update.

Your proposed patch has some major issues though: 1) for some reason, it unmutes commands that are properly muted; 2) I recall I've submitted most of the patches upstream, but now I see this:

> +-PREFIX  ?= /usr/local
> +-CC      ?= gcc
> ++PREFIX  = /usr/local
> ++CC      = cc
This is wrong and backwards.  Anyway, no need to resubmit anything (please do not spam our bugzilla), I'll sort it out.
